meta.title: Lucky — Discord Bot with Music, Moderation & Dashboard
meta.description: The all-in-one Discord bot for your community. Music, moderation, custom commands, auto-mod, and a full web dashboard. Free forever.

hero.subtitle: Music, moderation, custom commands, auto-mod, and a full web dashboard. Built for vibes.

features.heading: Powerful Features
features.subheading: Everything you need to manage your Discord server

free.question: Is Lucky free?
free.answer: Yes, Lucky is completely free with no premium tier.

commands.question: What commands does Lucky support?
commands.answer: Lucky supports 100+ commands across music, moderation, custom commands, and more.

autoplay.question: How does autoplay work?
autoplay.answer: Autoplay uses Spotify to match similar songs based on artist preferences you set.

selfHost.question: Can I self-host Lucky?
selfHost.answer: Lucky is hosted and managed by us. You cannot self-host the bot, but you can use the dashboard to configure it.

spam.question: How do I moderate spam?
spam.answer: Configure auto-mod rules for spam, caps, links, and more in the dashboard.

support.question: Where do I get support?
support.answer: Join our Discord support server or open an issue on GitHub.

footer.tagline: Discord bot with music, moderation, and more. Built for vibes.
footer.supportCopy: Need help? Join our Discord community.

meta.title: Login - Lucky
meta.description: Login to Lucky Dashboard to manage your Discord servers

login.headline: Manage your Discord servers
login.description: Configure moderation, custom commands, music, and more — all in one place.
login.permissionsNote: Your guild permissions and bot controls are tied to your Discord account.
